targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_net AS (
  SELECT
    datum::date AS work_date,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::int AS year_num,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum)::int AS month_num,
    TO_CHAR(datum, 'Mon') AS month_name,
    mitarbeiter,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 9 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.75
        WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 6 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.5
        ELSE SUM(dauer)
      END::numeric,
      2
    ) AS net_total
  FROM xl_projecttimes
  WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu = ANY(ARRAY[${service:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new = ANY(ARRAY[${activity:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter = ANY(ARRAY[${employee:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL
    AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text = ANY(ARRAY[${year:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') = ANY(ARRAY[${week:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat = ANY(ARRAY[${ma_kat:sqlstring}]::text[]))
  GROUP BY
    datum::date,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum),
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum),
    TO_CHAR(datum, 'Mon'),
    mitarbeiter
)
SELECT
  month_name AS "Month",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2023 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2023",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2024 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2024",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2025 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2025",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2026 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2026"
FROM daily_net
GROUP BY month_name, month_num
ORDER BY month_num

WITH daily_net AS (
  SELECT
    datum::date AS work_date,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::int AS year_num,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum)::int AS month_num,
    TO_CHAR(datum, 'Mon') AS month_name,
    mitarbeiter,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 9 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.75
        WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 6 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.5
        ELSE SUM(dauer)
      END::numeric,
      2
    ) AS net_total
  FROM xl_projecttimes
  WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu = ANY(ARRAY[${service:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new = ANY(ARRAY[${activity:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter = ANY(ARRAY[${employee:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL
    AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text = ANY(ARRAY[${year:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') = ANY(ARRAY[${week:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat = ANY(ARRAY[${ma_kat:sqlstring}]::text[]))
  GROUP BY
    datum::date,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum),
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum),
    TO_CHAR(datum, 'Mon'),
    mitarbeiter
)
SELECT
  month_name AS "Month",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2023 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2023",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2024 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2024",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2025 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2025",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year_num = 2026 THEN net_total ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS "2026"
FROM daily_net
GROUP BY month_name, month_num
ORDER BY month_num

list.name: year
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT jahr::text FROM xl_projecttimes ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.name: week
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT to_char(datum, 'IW') FROM xl_projecttimes ORDER BY 1 ASC

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bereich_neu FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE bereich_neu IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bereich_neu

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT task_new FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE task_new IS NOT NULL ORDER BY task_new

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mitarbeiter FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE mitarbeiter IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mitarbeiter
